description:
A modern and secure instant messaging for people, business and healthcare


[Feature] GIF: Outbound GIFs now use KLIPY
[Feature] Install: Machine-wide (MSI) deployments now update on launch instead of waiting for the next sign in
[Feature] Lock Screen: Now shows the unread message count while locked
[Fixed] Contact List: Fixed issue where sending a file from the right click menu did not work
[Fixed] Chat Window: Fixed a crash that could occur when closing a chat window
[Fixed] Chat Window: Fixed unread indicator margins on smaller interface in the chat list
[Fixed] Emoji: Fixed emoji chooser header icons being clipped at certain display scaling settings
[Fixed] File Transfer: Fixed crash related to file transfers
[Fixed] File Transfer: Fixed sending a file to a contact from the contact list
[Fixed] GIF: Fixed an issue where some incoming KLIPY GIFs may not display
[Fixed] Lock Screen: Window title now includes the Trillian name
[Fixed] Logs: Diagnostic logging can now log before account is chosen
[Fixed] Media: A single image attachment now sizes to its own aspect ratio instead of letterboxing
[Fixed] Menu: Fixed emoji icons drawing incorrectly at certain display scaling settings
[Fixed] Signin: Fixed issue where an incorrect password could be resubmitted automatically instead of prompting
[Fixed] Spellcheck: Autocorrect no longer repositions the cursor while you keep typing
[Fixed] What's New: Now opens centered on the correct monitor
